summary: The diff implements all five requirements: REQ-1 (Waggle portal format detection with metadata block skip), REQ-2 (gateway metadata extraction via Key:Value parsing), REQ-3 (PktState column lookup by header name for Normal/Stored counts), REQ-4 (GPS Status column lookup by header name for Valid fix count), and REQ-5 (FileSummaryCard preview component in CSVImportSection.tsx). All acceptance criteria appear to be addressed by the changes in csvParser.ts and CSVImportSection.tsx.
